info.description: Complete e-commerce backend server with authentication, product management, category management, and Google Drive integration.
info.title: E-Commerce Backend API

get.description: Retrieve all orders with pagination - admin only

put.description: Update order status and tracking number - admin only

get.description: Retrieve all payments with pagination - admin only

post.description: Authenticate user with email and password, returns JWT token and sets session cookie (24 hours)

get.description: Get current authenticated user information

post.description: Register a new user account with email, password, and role

get.description: Retrieve user's shopping cart with all items and summary

post.description: Add a product to user's shopping cart

delete.description: Remove all items from user's cart

put.description: Update quantity, note, or selection status of a cart item

delete.description: Remove a specific item from user's cart

get.description: Get all categories with optional filter by active status

post.description: Create a new product category with optional image upload

get.description: Get a single category by its ID

delete.description: Delete a category by its ID

get.description: Retrieve list of user's orders with pagination

post.description: Create a new order from selected cart items

get.description: Retrieve all available order statuses
Retrieve detailed information about a specific order

post.description: Cancel an order (only if not yet processed)

get.description: Retrieve list of user's payments with pagination

post.description: Create a payment transaction using Xendit payment gateway

get.description: Get payment information for a specific order

post.description: Webhook endpoint for Xendit payment notifications

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific payment
Check the current status of a payment from Xendit
Get all products with pagination

post.description: Create a new product with categories

get.description: Get all published products in a specific category with pagination

post.description: Upload and add an image to product gallery

put.description: Update gallery image display order or thumbnail status

delete.description: Delete a gallery image by its ID

get.description: Get a single product by its slug with categories and galleries
Get a single product by its ID with categories and galleries

delete.description: Soft delete a product by its ID

get.description: Get all gallery images for a specific product
Retrieve all ratings for a specific product with pagination

post.description: Create a rating/review for a product from a delivered order

get.description: Retrieve all ratings created by the authenticated user
Retrieve rating statistics for a product (average, count by stars)

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
